Name: update_departments_many
SQL: WITH mutation_result_0 AS (UPDATE "public"."departments" SET "description" = $1::text WHERE departments."name" = $2::text RETURNING *), mutation_result_1 AS (UPDATE "public"."departments" SET "description" = $3::text WHERE departments."name" = $4::text RETURNING *), mutation_result_2 AS (UPDATE "public"."departments" SET "description" = $5::text WHERE departments."name" = $6::text RETURNING *) SELECT jsonb_build_array((SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result_0))), (SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result_1))), (SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result_2))))
